recommendations.title: Conspiracy Theory
recommendations.overview: A man obsessed with conspiracy theories becomes a target after one of his theories turns out to be true. Unfortunately, in order to save himself, he has to figure out which theory it is.

recommendations.title: The Good Neighbor
recommendations.overview: Two high school filmmakers decide to create the illusion of a haunting on an unsuspecting neighbor.

recommendations.title: Hidden
recommendations.overview: A family takes refuge in a fallout shelter to avoid a dangerous outbreak.

recommendations.title: Cropsey
recommendations.overview: Realizing the urban legend of their youth has actually come true, two filmmakers delve into the mystery surrounding five missing children and the real-life boogeyman linked to their disappearances.

recommendations.title: Crush
recommendations.overview: A secret admirer's crush on a high school athlete takes a fatal turn.

recommendations.title: The Cat o' Nine Tails
recommendations.overview: A newsman works with a blind puzzle-solver to uncover a deadly conspiracy linked to a genetic research facility.

recommendations.title: Ripper Untold
recommendations.overview: A detective and a medical examiner join forces to solve a series of horrific murders in Victorian London - but one of them harbors a deadly secret.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Doorway
recommendations.overview: In the autumn of 1960, Father Thomas Riley and Father John Thornton were sent by the Vatican to investigate a miraculous event in an Irish home for 'fallen women', only to uncover something much more horrific.

recommendations.title: Killing Ground
recommendations.overview: A couple's camping trip turns into a frightening ordeal when they stumble across the scene of a horrific crime.

recommendations.title: Victoria
recommendations.overview: A young Spanish woman who has newly moved to Berlin finds her flirtation with a local guy turn potentially deadly as their night out with his friends reveals a dangerous secret.
